module.name: roksbnkctl
module.description: roksbnkctl — deploy F5 BIG-IP Next for Kubernetes on IBM Cloud ROKS/IKS. Runs inside the digest-pinned roksbnkctl-tools-runner container image; no host tooling required.

required.name: region
required.description: IBM Cloud region for the ROKS/IKS cluster (e.g. us-south).

required.name: cluster_name
required.description: Name of the ROKS/IKS cluster to create or target.

optional.name: provision_cluster
optional.description: Gate for the 'cluster up' step. When false, an existing cluster is reused.

optional.name: deploy_bnk
optional.description: Gate for the 'bnk up' step. When false, only the cluster is provisioned.
